'''''Star Wars Galaxy Magazine'' 5''' is the fifth issue of ''[[Star Wars Galaxy Magazine]]''. It was published by [[Topps]] in fall [[1995]]. The Deluxe Collectors' Edition of issue 5, exclusive to subscribers and comic stores, came polybagged with promotional trading cards for ''[[1996 Topps Star Wars: Return of the Jedi Widevision]]'', [[1995 Topps Star Wars MasterVisions|''1995 Topps Star Wars Master Visions'']], and ''[[1995 Topps Star Wars Galaxy Series 3]]''. This issue also included a [[Ralph McQuarrie]] fold-out poster.

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
